faqs:
What is Q-Itra 100 Capsule used for?
Q-Itra 100 Capsule is used to treat fungal infections caused by Trichophyton spp., Microsporum spp., and Epidermophyton floccosum. The infections caused could be ringworm infection, infection of feet, or infection in groin and buttocks. This medicine also treats persistent infection of fingernails and toenails, persistent candida (yeast) infections of vagina or candida (yeast) infections of the mouth or throat in patients with lower resistance to disease. It is also used in the treatment of cryptococcal infection and infections caused by histoplasma, aspergillus and blastomyces.
For how long do I need to take Q-Itra 100 Capsule?
The dose and length of treatment will depend on the type and site of infection and your response to the treatment. For example, if you are taking Q-Itra 100 Capsule for athlete’s foot (fungal infection of the skin on the feet and between the toes), the dose may need to be taken for 30 days. While, on the other hand, if you are taking it for candidal infection of vagina, the dose may take about 1 to 3 3 days depending on the dosage advised by the doctor.
What should I do if I skip a dose of Q-Itra 100 Capsule?
If you forget to take your dose, take the missed dose as soon as you remember. However, if it is time for your next dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular schedule. Do not double the dose to make up for the forgotten dose.
I am taking Q-Itra 100 Capsule for nail infection but there does not seem to be any improvement. Can I stop taking it?
No, you should not stop taking Q-Itra 100 Capsule without completing the entire course. This is because if you stop the medication then your fungal infection may not get completely cured. It usually takes about 6-9 months for the nail lesions to get cured and after that the new nail also takes several months to grow. Therefore, do not worry if you do not see any improvement during the treatment.
Why has my doctor asked me to get blood tests done?
Your doctor may have prescribed blood tests to monitor your liver’s functioning. This is because the use of Q-Itra 100 Capsule may cause serious liver damage. Therefore, if you develop loss of appetite, nausea, vomiting, dark urine or abdominal pain while taking Q-Itra 100 Capsule, immediately inform your doctor.
Can I take an antacid and Q-Itra 100 Capsule together?
Q-Itra 100 Capsule can be utilized by the body if there is sufficient acid in the stomach. Medicines for stomach ulcers, heartburn or indigestion neutralize the acid produced by the stomach. Therefore, it is advised to avoid taking antacids or any such medicine for a minimum of 2 hours after taking Q-Itra 100 Capsule. However, if you are taking antacids (medicines that stop the production of stomach acid), take Q-Itra 100 Capsule capsules with a drink of cola.
What is drug resistance? Is it possible to develop resistance to Q-Itra 100 Capsule?
Drug resistance is a condition when the fungi get modified in your body and the medicine is not able to work. There are reports which suggest resistance of some candida species (krusei, glabrata and tropicalis) with Q-Itra 100 Capsule. Q-Itra 100 Capsule should not be used for infection caused due to these species. It is advised to take the complete course of Q-Itra 100 Capsule to avoid drug resistance.
I am on alprazolam for quite some time. Is it okay if I start Q-Itra 100 Capsule now?
Yes, you can take both Alprazolam and Q-Itra 100 Capsule together, but keep a watch on the side effects of Alprazolam such as lightheadedness or drowsiness. If you experience side effects after taking Q-Itra 100 Capsule, talk to your doctor who will modify the dose of alprazolam.
My doctor prescribed Q-Itra 100 Capsule to me but not to my friend who had a similar fungal infection because she was on dofetilide. Why is it so?
Your doctor did not prescribe Q-Itra 100 Capsule to your friend because Q-Itra 100 Capsule interferes with the working of dofetilide. This interference can cause disturbed electrical activity of the heart, which can be harmful for the patient.

title: Q-Mind 100 Tablet
uses:
Q-Mind 100 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Mind 100 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Mind 100 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Mind 100 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

faqs:
What does Q-Mind 100 Tablet do to the brain?
Q-Mind 100 Tablet helps to correct chemical imbalances in the brain. It acts on various chemical messengers in the brain like dopamine and serotonin. It prevents the excessive activity of dopamine, helping to treat symptoms of schizophrenia and mania.
Is Q-Mind 100 Tablet a sleeping pill?
Q-Mind 100 Tablet can make you feel sleepy, but it is not used as a sleeping pill. Q-Mind 100 Tablet is approved for the treatment of symptoms of schizophrenia. It prevents as well as treats episodes of mania and depression in bipolar disorder. It is also used with other medicines to treat depression.
How long does Q-Mind 100 Tablet take to work?
You may start seeing an improvement within a week of starting Q-Mind 100 Tablet but full benefits may take about 4-6 weeks to appear.
Is Q-Mind 100 Tablet good for anxiety?

title: Q-Mind 25 Tablet
uses:
Q-Mind 25 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Mind 25 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Mind 25 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Mind 25 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

title: Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet
uses:
Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

safetyAdvice:
Alcohol
UNSAFE
Do not drink alcohol while you are taking this medicine. Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet may cause excessive drowsiness when taken with alcohol.
Pregnancy
CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR
The safety of Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet during pregnancy has not been established. There are no adequate and well-controlled studies in pregnant women, and animal data on reproductive toxicity are insufficient. Your doctor will weigh the benefits and any potential risks before prescribing.
Breast feeding
CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR
Information regarding the use of Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet during breastfeeding is not available. Please consult your doctor.
Driving
CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR
It is not known whether Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet alters the ability to drive. Do not drive if you experience any symptoms that affect your ability to concentrate and react. Please consult your doctor.
Kidney
CAUTION
Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet should be used with caution in patients with severe kidney disease. Dose adjustment may be needed.
Liver
CAUTION
Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet should be used with caution in patients with liver disease. Dose adjustment may be needed.
faqs:
What does Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet do to the brain?
Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet helps to correct chemical imbalances in the brain. It acts on various chemical messengers in the brain like dopamine and serotonin. It prevents the excessive activity of dopamine, helping to treat symptoms of schizophrenia and mania.
Is Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet a sleeping pill?
Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet can make you feel sleepy, but it is not used as a sleeping pill. Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet is approved for the treatment of symptoms of schizophrenia. It prevents as well as treats episodes of mania and depression in bipolar disorder. It is also used with other medicines to treat depression.
How long does Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet take to work?
You may start seeing an improvement within a week of starting Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet but full benefits may take about 4-6 weeks to appear.
Is Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet good for anxiety?
Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet has not been approved for the treatment of anxiety; however, your doctor may prescribe it for anxiety. Some studies suggest its use in post-traumatic stress disorder, generalized anxiety disorder, and anxiety associated with mood disorders.
What should I avoid while taking Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet?
Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet can cause drowsiness. So, do not drive, operate machinery or do anything dangerous until you know how Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet affects you. Do not drink alcohol while taking Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet as it may worsen the drowsiness. Avoid getting dehydrated or over-exposure to heat.
Can I stop taking Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet if I am better now?
No, you should not stop taking Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet without consulting your doctor. Suddenly stopping it may cause nausea, vomiting, headache, diarrhea, dizziness, irritability and inability to sleep. If you feel better, consult your doctor who will gradually reduce the dose before completely stopping it.
Can Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet cause weight gain?
Yes, weight gain is a common side effect of Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet. If you feel you are gaining weight, consult your doctor or a nutritionist who will suggest you a diet and some exercise to help you manage your weight.
How should Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet be taken?
Take Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet exactly as advised by your doctor. Do not split, chew or crush the tablets. Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not take it with food. It is advised to take this medicine for at least one hour before a meal or at bedtime. Do not take grapefruit while taking Q-Mind SR 100 Tablet as it may affect the working of this medicine.

title: Q-Mind SR 300 Tablet
uses:
Q-Mind SR 300 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Mind SR 300 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Mind SR 300 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Mind SR 300 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

title: Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet
uses:
Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

sideEffects:
Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them
Common side effects of Q-Mind

safetyAdvice:
Alcohol
UNSAFE
Do not drink alcohol while you are taking this medicine. Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet may cause excessive drowsiness when taken with alcohol.
Pregnancy
CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR
The safety of Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet during pregnancy has not been established. There are no adequate and well-controlled studies in pregnant women, and animal data on reproductive toxicity are insufficient. Your doctor will weigh the benefits and any potential risks before prescribing.
Breast feeding
CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR
Information regarding the use of Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet during breastfeeding is not available. Please consult your doctor.
Driving
CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR
It is not known whether Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet alters the ability to drive. Do not drive if you experience any symptoms that affect your ability to concentrate and react. Please consult your doctor.
Kidney
CAUTION
Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet should be used with caution in patients with severe kidney disease. Dose adjustment may be needed.
Liver
CAUTION
Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet should be used with caution in patients with liver disease. Dose adjustment may be needed.
faqs:
What does Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet do to the brain?
Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet helps to correct chemical imbalances in the brain. It acts on various chemical messengers in the brain like dopamine and serotonin. It prevents the excessive activity of dopamine, helping to treat symptoms of schizophrenia and mania.
Is Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet a sleeping pill?
Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet can make you feel sleepy, but it is not used as a sleeping pill. Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet is approved for the treatment of symptoms of schizophrenia. It prevents as well as treats episodes of mania and depression in bipolar disorder. It is also used with other medicines to treat depression.
How long does Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet take to work?
You may start seeing an improvement within a week of starting Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet but full benefits may take about 4-6 weeks to appear.
Is Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet good for anxiety?
Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet has not been approved for the treatment of anxiety; however, your doctor may prescribe it for anxiety. Some studies suggest its use in post-traumatic stress disorder, generalized anxiety disorder, and anxiety associated with mood disorders.
What should I avoid while taking Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet?
Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet can cause drowsiness. So, do not drive, operate machinery or do anything dangerous until you know how Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet affects you. Do not drink alcohol while taking Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet as it may worsen the drowsiness. Avoid getting dehydrated or over-exposure to heat.
Can I stop taking Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet if I am better now?
No, you should not stop taking Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet without consulting your doctor. Suddenly stopping it may cause nausea, vomiting, headache, diarrhea, dizziness, irritability and inability to sleep. If you feel better, consult your doctor who will gradually reduce the dose before completely stopping it.
Can Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet cause weight gain?
Yes, weight gain is a common side effect of Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet. If you feel you are gaining weight, consult your doctor or a nutritionist who will suggest you a diet and some exercise to help you manage your weight.
How should Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet be taken?
Take Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet exactly as advised by your doctor. Do not split, chew or crush the tablets. Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not take it with food. It is advised to take this medicine for at least one hour before a meal or at bedtime. Do not take grapefruit while taking Q-Mind SR 400 Tablet as it may affect the working of this medicine.

If you feel better, consult your doctor who will gradually reduce the dose before completely stopping it.
Can Q-Mind SR 50 Tablet cause weight gain?
Yes, weight gain is a common side effect of Q-Mind SR 50 Tablet. If you feel you are gaining weight, consult your doctor or a nutritionist who will suggest you a diet and some exercise to help you manage your weight.
How should Q-Mind SR 50 Tablet be taken?
Take Q-Mind SR 50 Tablet exactly as advised by your doctor. Do not split, chew or crush the tablets. Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not take it with food. title: Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange
uses:
Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange may be given to your child with or without food. Always follow the exact dose and duration prescribed by the doctor. The dosage will depend on your child’s age, weight, and the severity of symptoms. Do not stop the medicine early, even if your child seems to be feeling better, unless advised by the doctor.
Common side effects may include nausea, vomiting, or headache. These are usually mild and temporary. However, if you notice anything unusual or are concerned about how your child is responding to the medicine, consult your doctor promptly. This medicine may also cause drowsiness, so avoid engaging your child in activities that require alertness until you know how it affects them.
Make sure your child stays well hydrated while taking Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange. Inform your doctor if your child has any history of liver or kidney problems, as the dose may need to be adjusted accordingly.
Note:
As per the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange should not be used in children below 4 years of age.
benefits:
In Treatment of Common cold
Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange effectively relieves symptoms associated with common cold in children, such as blocked nose, runny nose, watery eyes, and sneezing. It helps loosen thick mucus, making it easier to cough out. It also shrinks the blood vessels and provides rapid relief that lasts for several hours. These actions make breathing easier. Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange usually starts working within a few minutes, and the effects can last up to several hours.
sideEffects:
Most side effects do not require any medical attention and disappear as your body adjusts to the medicine. Consult your doctor if they persist or if you’re worried about them

faqs:
What is Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange?
Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange is a combination of two medicines that help to relieve the symptoms of cold. It consists of Chlorpheniramine, an antiallergic that relieves allergy symptoms like runny nose, watery eyes, and sneezing. It also consists of Phenylephrine, a decongestant that narrows the small blood vessels providing relief from congestion or stuffiness in the nose.
Is it safe to use Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange?
Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange is safe for most of the patients when taken according to the dose and duration recommended by the doctor. However, in some patients it may cause common side effects like nausea, vomiting, headache, sleepiness and other uncommon or rare side effects. If you experience any problem while taking this medicine, inform your doctor as soon as possible.
Can the use of Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange cause nausea and vomiting?
Yes, the use of Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange can cause nausea and vomiting. Taking it with milk, food or with antacids can prevent nausea. Avoid taking fatty or fried foods along with this medication. In case of vomiting, drink plenty of water or other fluids by taking small frequent sips. Talk to your doctor if vomiting persists. Do not take any other medicine without speaking to a doctor.
Can the use of Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange cause sleepiness or dizziness?
Yes, the most common side effect of Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange is drowsiness. Avoid driving, operating heavy machinery or engaging in other activities that need your full attention, unless your healthcare provider has permitted you to do so. Do not drink alcohol or other cough and cold medicines. Also, avoid taking medicines that help you sleep while taking Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange as it may lead to excessive drowsiness.
Can I take a higher than the recommended dose of this medicine?
No, taking a higher than the recommended dose of Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange can lead to increased side effects due to overdose. Do not start, stop or change the dosage of your medicine before consulting your doctor.
Are there any specific contraindications associated with the use of Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange?
The use of Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange is considered to be harmful to patients with known allergy to any of the components of this medication. Tell your healthcare provider about all your medical conditions such as heart disease, high blood pressure, hyperthyroidism, glaucoma and enlarged prostate (difficulty in urination) before taking Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange.
What is the recommended storage condition for Q-Minic Oral Drops Orange?
Keep this medicine in the container or the pack it came in, tightly closed. Store it according to the instructions mentioned on the pack or label. Dispose of the unused medicine. Make sure it is not consumed by pets, children and other people.

title: Q-Mol Infusion
uses:
Pain relief
Treatment of Fever
Benefits of Q-Mol Infusion
In Pain relief
Q-Mol Infusion is a common painkiller used to treat aches and pains. It works by blocking chemical messengers in the brain that tell us we have pain. It is effective in relieving pain caused by headache, migraine, nerve pain, toothache, sore throat, period (menstrual) pains, arthritis, and muscle aches. This medicine is very widely used and very rarely causes side effects if taken at the right dosage. Take it as it is prescribed to get the most benefit. Do not take more or for longer than needed as that can be dangerous. In general, you should take the lowest dose that works, for the shortest possible time. title: Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule
uses:
Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule should be taken as directed by your doctor. It is best taken with or after food, as this helps your body absorb it, and you should take it regularly to get the most benefits. If you are using it to treat osteoporosis, you will also be prescribed other medicines. This medicine may be only part of a complete treatment program that includes making changes to your diet and taking calcium and vitamin supplements. Learn about the foods you should eat to ensure you get enough calcium and vitamin D.
Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule has few side effects, and none are common. If you take too much, you may feel weakness, muscle pain, or a metallic taste in your mouth. If you experience any such side effects, speak with your doctor. They may be able to help you reduce or treat the symptoms.
Before taking this medicine, tell your doctor if you have high calcium levels in your blood or if you have any heart, kidney, or liver disease. Some other medicines can decrease the absorption of vitamin D3, so let your doctor know about all the other medicines you are taking to make sure you are safe. This medicine may help during pregnancy when your body needs more vitamin D, but too much could harm your baby. Discuss it with your doctor.
benefits:
In Treatment of Osteoporosis
Osteoporosis is a common condition that weakens bones, making them fragile and more likely to break. It often occurs in women after menopause. Vitamin D is important for calcium absorption and helps regulate the amount of calcium and phosphate in your body. If you do not have enough calcium, it can damage your bones. Vitamin D will help keep your bones strong and healthy and reduce the risk of them becoming weak and more likely to break.
Regular exercise (especially weight-bearing exercise), healthy foods containing calcium and vitamin D, and reducing alcohol and tobacco consumption can help improve bone strength.
In Treatment of Vitamin D deficiency
Normally, your body creates vitamin D from sunlight, but if you do not have enough, you will be prescribed this medicine as a supplement. It is important to keep taking it regularly to get the benefits. You may not notice it working, but keep taking it to protect your bones. Additionally, it can boost your immunity and increase the body's resistance against various infections.

faqs:
Is it better to take Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule at night or in the morning?
You can take Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule at any time, morning or night. However, limited information is available about the best time to take it. Take it strictly as advised by your doctor.
What are the benefits of taking Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule?
Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule is vital for maintaining bone health and supporting the health of the immune system, brain, and nervous system. It regulates insulin levels and is important for a healthy heart and blood vessels.
How should Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule be taken?
Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule should be swallowed whole with water and not crushed or chewed. It is advised to take it with the main meal of the day to increase its absorption.
Who should not take Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule?
Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule should not be taken by patients allergic to cholecalciferol, patients with increased calcium levels in the blood, or patients with calcium in the urine. Patients with kidney stones or severe kidney problems should also avoid its use.
What happens if I take too much Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule?
Taking too much Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule for an extended period may increase calcium levels in the blood (hypercalcemia). This may cause weakness, fatigue, vomiting, diarrhea, sluggishness, kidney stones, increased blood pressure, and growth retardation in children.
How much vitamin D should I take daily?
The daily requirement of vitamin D is 4000 IU/day. Since your diet may not meet this requirement, you may need 1000 - 3000 IU/day of vitamin D supplements. Q-ORB 60K Softgel Capsule is a form of vitamin D used as a supplement in patients with vitamin D deficiency.
What happens if vitamin D is low?
Low vitamin D levels may cause rickets in children and osteomalacia in adults. Vitamin D deficiency may also increase the risk of diabetes mellitus type 1, high blood pressure, depression, some cancers, and osteoporosis.

Can I take Q-Para 1K Tablet SR and ibuprofen together?

How long does a Q-Para 1K Tablet SR take to work?

What are the serious side effects of taking an excess of the Q-Para 1K Tablet SR?
An overdose of Q-Para 1K Tablet SR may cause severe, life-threatening liver injury. Taking more than the prescribed dose may also cause kidney injury, decreased platelet count, and coma. Early symptoms of an overdose include nausea, vomiting, and general fatigue. Immediately consult a doctor or reach an emergency department in case of a suspected overdose.
Can Q-Para 1K Tablet SR cause nausea and vomiting?
Yes, Q-Para 1K Tablet SR may cause nausea and vomiting. Taking it with milk, food, or antacids can prevent nausea. Avoid taking fatty or fried foods along with this medication. In case of vomiting, drink plenty of water or other fluids by taking small, frequent sips. Talk to your doctor if vomiting persists and you notice signs of dehydration, like dark-colored, strong-smelling urine, or a low frequency of urination. Do not take any other medicines without speaking to your doctor.

If you take Q-Para 1K Tablet SR when you do not have a fever, then any minor pain or ache you might be experiencing in your body will be relieved. If you do not have any pain, you will not notice any difference. At low doses, Q-Para 1K Tablet SR is harmless.

The dose will depend on what you are being treated for, but you should always complete a full course of this antibiotic as prescribed by your doctor. Do not stop taking it until you have finished, even when you feel better. If you stop taking it early, some bacteria may survive and the infection may come back.

What if I don't get better after using Q-Pas Granules?
Inform your doctor if you don't feel better after finishing the full course of treatment. Also, inform him if your symptoms are getting worse while using this medicine.
Can I stop taking Q-Pas Granules when my symptoms are relieved?
No, do not stop taking Q-Pas Granules and complete the full course of treatment even if you feel better. Your symptoms may improve before the infection is completely cured.
Can the use of Q-Pas Granules cause diarrhea?
Yes, the use of Q-Pas Granules can cause diarrhea. It is an antibiotic which kills the harmful bacteria. However, it also affects the helpful bacteria in your stomach or intestine and causes diarrhea. If diarrhea gets severe, talk to your doctor about it.

title: Q-Pin 25 Tablet
uses:
Q-Pin 25 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Pin 25 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Pin 25 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Pin 25 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

faqs:
What does Q-Pin 25 Tablet do to the brain?
Q-Pin 25 Tablet helps to correct chemical imbalances in the brain. It acts on various chemical messengers in the brain like dopamine and serotonin. It prevents the excessive activity of dopamine, helping to treat symptoms of schizophrenia and mania.
Is Q-Pin 25 Tablet a sleeping pill?
Q-Pin 25 Tablet can make you feel sleepy, but it is not used as a sleeping pill. Q-Pin 25 Tablet is approved for the treatment of symptoms of schizophrenia. It prevents as well as treats episodes of mania and depression in bipolar disorder. It is also used with other medicines to treat depression.
How long does Q-Pin 25 Tablet take to work?
You may start seeing an improvement within a week of starting Q-Pin 25 Tablet but full benefits may take about 4-6 weeks to appear.
Is Q-Pin 25 Tablet good for anxiety?
Q-Pin 25 Tablet has not been approved for the treatment of anxiety; however, your doctor may prescribe it for anxiety. Some studies suggest its use in post-traumatic stress disorder, generalized anxiety disorder, and anxiety associated with mood disorders.
What should I avoid while taking Q-Pin 25 Tablet?
Q-Pin 25 Tablet can cause drowsiness. So, do not drive, operate machinery or do anything dangerous until you know how Q-Pin 25 Tablet affects you. Do not drink alcohol while taking Q-Pin 25 Tablet as it may worsen the drowsiness. Avoid getting dehydrated or over-exposure to heat.
Can I stop taking Q-Pin 25 Tablet if I am better now?
No, you should not stop taking Q-Pin 25 Tablet without consulting your doctor. Suddenly stopping it may cause nausea, vomiting, headache, diarrhea, dizziness, irritability and inability to sleep. If you feel better, consult your doctor who will gradually reduce the dose before completely stopping it.
Can Q-Pin 25 Tablet cause weight gain?
Yes, weight gain is a common side effect of Q-Pin 25 Tablet. If you feel you are gaining weight, consult your doctor or a nutritionist who will suggest you a diet and some exercise to help you manage your weight.
How should Q-Pin 25 Tablet be taken?
Take Q-Pin 25 Tablet exactly as advised by your doctor. Do not split, chew or crush the tablets. Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not take it with food. It is advised to take this medicine for at least one hour before a meal or at bedtime. Do not take grapefruit while taking Q-Pin 25 Tablet as it may affect the working of this medicine.

faqs:
What does Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet do to the brain?
Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet helps to correct chemical imbalances in the brain. It acts on various chemical messengers in the brain like dopamine and serotonin. It prevents the excessive activity of dopamine, helping to treat symptoms of schizophrenia and mania.
Is Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet a sleeping pill?
Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet can make you feel sleepy, but it is not used as a sleeping pill. Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet is approved for the treatment of symptoms of schizophrenia. It prevents as well as treats episodes of mania and depression in bipolar disorder. It is also used with other medicines to treat depression.
How long does Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet take to work?
You may start seeing an improvement within a week of starting Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet but full benefits may take about 4-6 weeks to appear.
Is Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet good for anxiety?
Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet has not been approved for the treatment of anxiety; however, your doctor may prescribe it for anxiety. Some studies suggest its use in post-traumatic stress disorder, generalized anxiety disorder, and anxiety associated with mood disorders.
What should I avoid while taking Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet?
Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet can cause drowsiness. So, do not drive, operate machinery or do anything dangerous until you know how Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet affects you. Do not drink alcohol while taking Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet as it may worsen the drowsiness. Avoid getting dehydrated or over-exposure to heat.
Can I stop taking Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet if I am better now?
No, you should not stop taking Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet without consulting your doctor. Suddenly stopping it may cause nausea, vomiting, headache, diarrhea, dizziness, irritability and inability to sleep. If you feel better, consult your doctor who will gradually reduce the dose before completely stopping it.
Can Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet cause weight gain?
Yes, weight gain is a common side effect of Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet. If you feel you are gaining weight, consult your doctor or a nutritionist who will suggest you a diet and some exercise to help you manage your weight.
How should Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet be taken?
Take Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet exactly as advised by your doctor. Do not split, chew or crush the tablets. Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not take it with food. It is advised to take this medicine for at least one hour before a meal or at bedtime. Do not take grapefruit while taking Q-Pin SR 100 Tablet as it may affect the working of this medicine.

title: Q-Pin SR 200 Tablet
uses:
Q-Pin SR 200 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Pin SR 200 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Pin SR 200 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Pin SR 200 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

title: Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet
uses:
Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet may be taken with or without food. However, it is advised to take it at the same time each day as this helps to maintain a consistent level of medicine in the body. Take this in the dose and duration as advised by your doctor and if you have missed a dose, take it as soon as you remember. It is important that this medication is not stopped suddenly without talking to your doctor as it may worsen your symptoms. However, discontinue this medicine immediately if you experience Neuroleptic malignant syndrome (NMS), characterized by fever, muscle rigidity, and altered consciousness or seizures.
Some common side effects of this medicine include decreased hemoglobin levels in the blood, increased triglycerides level in blood, decreased cholesterol level in blood, headache, extrapyramidal symptoms, dry mouth, and withdrawal symptoms. Initially, this medicine may cause a sudden drop in blood pressure when you change positions, so it is better to rise slowly if you have been sitting or lying down. It also causes dizziness and sleepiness, so do not drive or do anything that requires mental focus until you know how this medicine affects you. This medicine may increase your weight but, modifying your lifestyle by having a healthy diet and exercising regularly can reduce this side effect.
You should be cautious while using this medicine as it may increase the risk of developing diabetes, so it is better to monitor glucose regularly. Inform your doctor if you develop any unusual changes in mood or behavior, new or worsening depression, or suicidal thoughts while taking this medicine.
benefits:
In Treatment of Mania
Mania means extremely excited or elevated mood. Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet helps calm the mood and relax the nerves. This stabilises the mood and prevents the symptoms of mania from recurring again. Taking Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet will ensure that you have a better social life and are able to do daily activities more comfortably.
In Treatment of Schizophrenia
Schizophrenia is a mental disorder in which a person’s thinking ability, feelings and behavior become abnormal. Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet helps restore the chemical imbalances in the brain that are responsible for such changes. It improves thoughts, behavior and enhances the quality of life.

faqs:
What does Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet do to the brain?
Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet helps to correct chemical imbalances in the brain. It acts on various chemical messengers in the brain like dopamine and serotonin. It prevents the excessive activity of dopamine, helping to treat symptoms of schizophrenia and mania.
Is Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet a sleeping pill?
Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet can make you feel sleepy, but it is not used as a sleeping pill. Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet is approved for the treatment of symptoms of schizophrenia. It prevents as well as treats episodes of mania and depression in bipolar disorder. It is also used with other medicines to treat depression.
How long does Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet take to work?
You may start seeing an improvement within a week of starting Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet but full benefits may take about 4-6 weeks to appear.
Is Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet good for anxiety?
Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet has not been approved for the treatment of anxiety; however, your doctor may prescribe it for anxiety. Some studies suggest its use in post-traumatic stress disorder, generalized anxiety disorder, and anxiety associated with mood disorders.
What should I avoid while taking Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet?
Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet can cause drowsiness. So, do not drive, operate machinery or do anything dangerous until you know how Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet affects you. Do not drink alcohol while taking Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet as it may worsen the drowsiness. Avoid getting dehydrated or over-exposure to heat.
Can I stop taking Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet if I am better now?
No, you should not stop taking Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet without consulting your doctor. Suddenly stopping it may cause nausea, vomiting, headache, diarrhea, dizziness, irritability and inability to sleep. If you feel better, consult your doctor who will gradually reduce the dose before completely stopping it.
Can Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet cause weight gain?
Yes, weight gain is a common side effect of Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet. If you feel you are gaining weight, consult your doctor or a nutritionist who will suggest you a diet and some exercise to help you manage your weight.
How should Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet be taken?
Take Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet exactly as advised by your doctor. Do not split, chew or crush the tablets. Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not take it with food. It is advised to take this medicine for at least one hour before a meal or at bedtime. Do not take grapefruit while taking Q-Pin SR 50 Tablet as it may affect the working of this medicine.
